Export.zv: Cache for UNIX (Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86-64) 2014.1.3 (Build 775)
Export.Routine: DVPPROC ;DALOI/JCH - Digital Veterans Platform ;11/15/17 ;;1.0;DIGITAL VETERANS PLATFORM;****; ;;Per VHA Directive 2004-038, this routine should not be modified. ; ; External References DBIA# ; ------------------- ----- Q ; RDPROC(SOURCE,TARGET) ; N DFN,ICN,PATIENTI,DVPSTN,DVPSITE,DVPID S (DFN,ICN)="",SMRY=0 N X F X="procedure" D INITPARM^DVPUTL(.X) S DVPSITE=$$SITE^VASITE,DVPSTN=$P(DVPSITE,U,3) I $P($G(PROCEDUR),":",6)="" D G QUIT . D OOERR^DVPERR(.TARGET,"error","required","MSG_RESOURCE_ID_MISSING","Parameter procedureId is required.","RDPROC^DVPPROC") I '$P(PROCEDUR,":",6) D G QUIT . D OOERR^DVPERR(.TARGET,"error","code-invalid","MSG_ID_INVALID","The supplied procedureId: "_PROCEDUR_" has an invalid format.","RDPROC^DVPPROC") I '$$SITECHK^DVPXUTL(PROCEDUR,"RDPROC^DVPPROC") G QUIT S ICN=$P(PROCEDUR,":",5) I $$PATCHECK^DVPUTLS(ICN,"RDPROC^DVPPROC")=0 D G QUIT . D OOERR^DVPERR(.TARGET,"error","not-found","MSG_NO_MATCH","No patient found for ICN: "_+$P($G(PROCEDUR),":",6),"RDPROC^DVPPROC") N RECSET S RECSET=$NA(^TMP($J,"RECSET")) K @RECSET D GETPROCS^DVPPROC1(RECSET,"R",PROCEDUR,,0) I '$D(@RECSET@("results",+$P($G(PROCEDUR),":",6))) D Q . D OOERR^DVPERR(.TARGET,"error","not-found","MSG_NO_MATCH","No procedure found for procedureId: "_+$P($G(PROCEDUR),":",6),"RDPROC^DVPPROC") M @TARGET@("error")=@RECSET@("error") M @TARGET@("results","procedure")=@RECSET@("results",+$P($G(PROCEDUR),":",6)) ; QUIT ; Q ; SRCPROC(SOURCE,TARGET) ; N DFN,ICN,PATIENTI,SMRY,RECMAX,DT1,DT2,DVPSTN,DVPSITE,QRYDT,QRYDT1,QRYDT2 S (DFN,ICN,DT1,DT2)="",RECMAX=100,SMRY=0 D GETPARMS^DVPUTL(.SOURCE,.PARAMS) ; ; Clean out unused params D CLNPARAM^DVPUTLS I $P($G(QUERYPAR("patient")),U)="" D G QUIT . D OOERR^DVPERR(.TARGET,"error","required","MSG_RESOURCE_ID_MISSING","Parameter: patient is required.","SRCPROC^DVPPROC") S ICN=$P($G(QUERYPAR("patient")),U) S DVPSITE=$$SITE^VASITE,DVPSTN=$P(DVPSITE,U,3) ; ; Summary elements only S:$P($G(QUERYPAR("_summary")),U)="true" SMRY=1 ; ;Date: supported only gt;lt;ge;le;eq prefixes I $P($G(QUERYPAR("date")),U)'="",$P($G(QUERYPAR("date")),U,3)="" D G QUIT . D OOERR^DVPERR(.TARGET,"error","required","MSG_PARAM_INVALID","Parameter: date is missing the prefix.","SRCHVS^DVPVS2") I $P($G(QUERYPAR("date")),U)'="",$P($G(QUERYPAR("date")),U,3)'="" D G:'DTFND QUIT . N PFX S PFX=$E($P($G(QUERYPAR("date")),U,3),1,2) . N APFX F APFX="gt","lt","ge","le","eq" S:APFX=PFX DTFND=1 . I 'DTFND D Q . . D OOERR^DVPERR(.TARGET,"error","value","MSG_PARAM_INVALID","Parameter: date, prefix: "_PFX_" is not valid.","SRCHVS^DVPVS2") . S QRYDT=$TR($P($G(QUERYPAR("date")),U),"T","@") . K QRYDT1 . ; First Date parameter contains only yyyy . I QRYDT?4N D YRDT(PFX,QRYDT,.QRYDT1) . ; First Date parameter contains only yyyyy-mm . I QRYDT?4N1"-"2N D MOYRDT(PFX,QRYDT,.QRYDT1) . ; First Date parameter contains at least yyyy-mm-dd . I '$D(QRYDT1("SDT")) S QRYDT=$$DATE^DVPXUTL(QRYDT) D . . S QRYDT1("PFX")=PFX . . I PFX="eq" S (QRYDT1("SDT"),QRYDT1("EDT"))=QRYDT I '$P(QRYDT1("EDT"),".",2) S $P(QRYDT1("EDT"),".",2)=24 . . I PFX="ge" S QRYDT1("SDT")=QRYDT,QRYDT1("EDT")=$$FMADD^XLFDT($$NOW^XLFDT(),30,0,0,0) . . I PFX="le" S QRYDT1("EDT")=QRYDT,QRYDT1("SDT")=$$FMADD^XLFDT($$NOW^XLFDT(),-10950,0,0,0) I '$P(QRYDT1("EDT"),".",2) S $P(QRYDT1("EDT"),".",2)=2499 . . I PFX="gt" S QRYDT1("SDT")=$S(QRYDT[".":QRYDT_"249999",1:QRYDT_".249999"),QRYDT1("EDT")=$$FMADD^XLFDT($$NOW^XLFDT,30,0,0,0) . . I PFX="lt" S QRYDT1("EDT")=$$FMADD^XLFDT(QRYDT,0,0,0,-1)_9999,QRYDT1("SDT")=$$FMADD^XLFDT($$NOW^XLFDT(),-10950,0,0,0) . ; Second Date parameter . I $P($G(QUERYPAR("$date")),U)'="" D . . I $P($G(QUERYPAR("$date")),U,3)="" D Q . . . D OOERR^DVPERR(.TARGET,"error","required","MSG_PARAM_INVALID","Parameter: date is missing the prefix.","SRCHVS^DVPVS2") . . K APFX,PFX,DTFND . . S PFX=$E($P($G(QUERYPAR("$date")),U,3),1,2) . . F APFX="gt","lt","ge","le","eq" S:APFX=PFX DTFND=1 . . I 'DTFND D Q . . . D OOERR^DVPERR(.TARGET,"error","value","MSG_PARAM_INVALID","Parameter: date, prefix: "_PFX_" is not valid.","SRCHVS^DVPVS2") . . ; If date parameter contains time, convert "T" time indicator to vista "@" format . . S QRYDT=$TR($P($G(QUERYPAR("$date")),U),"T","@") . . ; yyyy second date parameter . . I QRYDT?4N D YRDT(PFX,QRYDT,.QRYDT2) Q . . ; yyyy-mm second date parameter . . I QRYDT?4N1"-"2N D MOYRDT(PFX,QRYDT,.QRYDT2) Q . . ; second data parameter contains at least yyyy-mm-dd . . S QRYDT=$$DATE^DVPXUTL(QRYDT),QRYDT2("PFX")=PFX . . I PFX="eq" S (QRYDT2("SDT"),QRYDT2("EDT"))=QRYDT S:'$P(QRYDT2("EDT"),".",2) $P(QRYDT2("EDT"),".",2)=24 . . I PFX="le" S QRYDT2("EDT")=QRYDT S QRYDT2("SDT")=$$FMADD^XLFDT($$NOW^XLFDT,-10950,0,0,0) S:'$P(QRYDT2("EDT"),".",2) $P(QRYDT2("EDT"),".",2)="249999" . . I PFX="lt" S QRYDT2("EDT")=QRYDT D . . . S QRYDT2("EDT")=$$FMADD^XLFDT(QRYDT2("EDT"),0,0,-1) S $P(QRYDT2("EDT"),".",2)=$P(QRYDT2("EDT"),".",2)_"00009999" . . . S QRYDT2("SDT")=$$FMADD^XLFDT($$NOW^XLFDT,-10950,0,0,0) . . I PFX="ge" S QRYDT2("SDT")=QRYDT,QRYDT2("EDT")=$$FMADD^XLFDT($$NOW^XLFDT,30,0,0,0) . . I PFX="gt" S QRYDT2("SDT")=$$FMADD^XLFDT(QRYDT,0,0,0,1),QRYDT2("EDT")=$$FMADD^XLFDT($$NOW^XLFDT,30,0,0,0) ; I $$PATCHECK^DVPUTLS(ICN,"SRCPROC^DVPPROC")=0 G QUIT2 ; N RECSET S RECSET=$NA(^TMP($J,"RECSET")) K @RECSET D GETPROCS^DVPPROC1(RECSET,"S",,ICN,SMRY,.QRYDT1,.QRYDT2) I $D(@RECSET@("error")) M @TARGET@("error")=@RECSET@("error") I $D(@RECSET@("results")) M @TARGET@("results","bundle")=@RECSET@("results") Q ; YRDT(PFX,DATE,FMDATE) ; Translate Year-only Date parameter to correct FM format for prefix PFX N TMPDT S FMDATE("PFX")=PFX I PFX="le" S TMPDT=DATE_"-12-31" S FMDATE("EDT")=$$DATE^DVPXUTL(TMPDT)_".249999",FMDATE("SDT")=$$FMADD^XLFDT($$NOW^XLFDT,-10950,0,0,0) I PFX="lt" S TMPDT=DATE_"-01-01" S FMDATE("EDT")=$$FMADD^XLFDT($$DATE^DVPXUTL(TMPDT),-1,0,0,0)_".249999",FMDATE("SDT")=$$FMADD^XLFDT($$NOW^XLFDT,-10950,0,0,0) I PFX="gt" S TMPDT=DATE_"-12-31" S FMDATE("SDT")=$$DATE^DVPXUTL(TMPDT)_".249999",FMDATE("EDT")=$$FMADD^XLFDT($$NOW^XLFDT,30,0,0,0) I PFX="ge" S TMPDT=DATE_"-01-01" S FMDATE("SDT")=$$FMADD^XLFDT($$DATE^DVPXUTL(TMPDT),-1,0,0,0)_".249999",FMDATE("EDT")=$$FMADD^XLFDT($$NOW^XLFDT,30,0,0,0) I PFX="eq" S TMPDT=DATE_"-01-01" S FMDATE("SDT")=$$FMADD^XLFDT($$DATE^DVPXUTL(TMPDT),-1,0,0,0)_".249999" D .S TMPDT=DATE_"-12-31" S FMDATE("EDT")=$$DATE^DVPXUTL(TMPDT)_".249999" Q ; MOYRDT(PFX,DATE,FMDATE) ; Translate Year-Month only date to correct FM format for prefix PFX N TMPDT S FMDATE("PFX")=PFX I PFX="le" S TMPDT=DATE_"-31" S FMDATE("EDT")=$$DATE^DVPXUTL(TMPDT)_".249999",FMDATE("SDT")=$$FMADD^XLFDT($$NOW^XLFDT,-10950,0,0,0) I PFX="lt" D . N TMPDT . S TMPDT=DATE_"-01" S FMDATE("EDT")=$$FMADD^XLFDT($$DATE^DVPXUTL(TMPDT),0,0,0,-1),$P(FMDATE("EDT"),".",2)="2499999" . S FMDATE("SDT")=$$FMADD^XLFDT($$NOW^XLFDT,-10950,0,0,0) I PFX="gt" D . N TMPDT,TMPDT2,TMPMON,TMPMON2 S TMPDT=DATE_"-15" . S TMPDT=$$DATE^DVPXUTL(TMPDT),(TMPMON,TMPMON2)=$E(TMPDT,4,5) . F I=1:1:32 Q:TMPMON'=TMPMON2 S TMPDT2=$$FMADD^XLFDT(TMPDT,I) S TMPMON2=$E(TMPDT2,4,5) . S FMDATE("SDT")=$$FMADD^XLFDT(TMPDT2,0,0,0,-1),$P(TMPDT2,".",2)="249999" . S FMDATE("EDT")=$$FMADD^XLFDT($$NOW^XLFDT,30,0,0,0) I PFX="ge" S TMPDT=DATE_"-01" S FMDATE("SDT")=$$FMADD^XLFDT($$DATE^DVPXUTL(TMPDT),-1,0,0,0)_".249999",FMDATE("EDT")=$$FMADD^XLFDT($$NOW^XLFDT,30,0,0,0) I PFX="eq" S TMPDT=DATE_"-01" S FMDATE("SDT")=$$FMADD^XLFDT($$DATE^DVPXUTL(TMPDT),-1,0,0,0)_".249999" D .S TMPDT=DATE_"-31" S FMDATE("EDT")=$$DATE^DVPXUTL(TMPDT)_".249999" Q ; QUIT2 ; Q
